refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with patients sitting on the floor. There is a lack of available seating.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see the waiting room was extremely crowded. Patients, including the elderly, were forced to sit on the floor due to the lack of available seating. This is unacceptable and uncomfortable for those waiting to receive medical attention.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, people are sitting on the floor, it's really uncomfortable.
